column1: 101 companies across warehouse/AMR, drones & UAVs, surgical & medical, agritech, underwater/inspection, defence, service and consumer robotics  |  Compiled Jun 2026
How to use: The Website column is the primary verified anchor for each company. LinkedIn = linkedin.com/company/<slug>; Careers = website + /careers (the most common pattern).
Most startups also post roles on LinkedIn Jobs and Wellfound (wellfound.com). If a /careers path 404s, try /careers/, /jobs, or the company's LinkedIn 'Jobs' tab.
Rows flagged 'Verify domain' in Notes: company is real but the exact domain/slug should be confirmed before bulk use. Excludes MNC India arms (FANUC, ABB, Medtronic, Intuitive) and PSUs (HAL, DRDO).
